events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, high risk. The impulse line taps are installed backwards for both services — gas taps should be on top of the pipe with lines self-venting down to the transmitter, liquid taps should be on the side/bottom with lines self-draining down to the transmitter. As found (gas taps below, liquid taps on top), condensate will trap in the gas lines and gas will trap in the liquid lines, producing unreliable DP readings. Work should be held at rough-complete and impulse piping re-routed per API RP 551 and the manufacturer manual before proceeding to loop check/calibration.
